name: Sync Operation
description: Index sessions from agent platforms and extract memories

events.sync.started: Starting sync (trigger: {{trigger}}, max: {{input.maxSessions}} sessions, dry: {{input.dryRun}}, filter: {{input.agentFilter}})
events.sync.extract.complete: Extracted {{output.extractedSessions}} sessions ({{output.skippedSessions}} skipped, {{output.failedSessions}} failed, {{output.learningsNew}} new, {{output.learningsUpdated}} updated, cost: ${{output.costUsd}})

scenarios.description: Sync failed with error (lock busy or fatal)
